_meta.purpose: Destination index for the m_26_14-host-alert-summary transform — the COMPUTED rogue signal (Security alerts pivoted per host.name). Pre-created at bootstrap so the m_26_14-host-alert-lookup enrich policy can be PUT before the transform's first checkpoint (PUT _enrich/policy validates its source index exists). host.name MUST be keyword for the enrich match_field; the remaining pivot fields (alert_count, max_risk_score, last_alert, severities, rule_names) map dynamically.
_meta.dependency_order: Created in the templates stage; the index itself is created (empty) at the start of the triage stage, then the transform writes into it.
